rectified_nodes.fix_description: Removed outgoing 'contains' edge from return node b2 to b3, as a return node should not contain other operations.
Added 'contains' edge b1->b3 to make call reachable from the function; Removed 'contains' edge b3->b4 as b4 is now directly contained by b1.
Added 'contains' edge b1->b4 to make call reachable from the function.
Added 'data_flow' edge b4->b5 to connect the return node to the nearest value producer (call node b4).
